title: Inventor's Frontier
description: A Minecraft modpack with mods compiled mostly for my friends.
body:
# Welcome to Inventor's Frontier!
Hi there, and welcome to the official modpack page for Inventor's Frontier!
I'd like to introduce you to **Inventor's Frontier**!

Inventor's Frontier is a modpack that my friends and I compiled, we're huge fans of technology — so get ready for plenty of techy mods!
But we also enjoy some exploration and creative building, so you’ll find plenty of mods for adventuring and decorating to complement the tech side.

Whether you’re here to build, explore, or just relax, we hope you’ll enjoy what we’ve put together.

Happy inventing!

## Big **thank you** to every creator of these mods:
